## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss onboarding progress and address team questions, as the original strategy & vision meeting was postponed due to scheduling conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Onboarding simulations for content managers due by next Wednesday/Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [PTO policy is flexible (unlimited vacation), aiming for 20-30 days total per year including holidays](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [KPIs/OKRs not yet formally established due to company's newness; focus on communication with managers for performance feedback](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Company considering options for device management/security measures for remote team](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Progress & Technical Issues

  - [Tiandra experiencing Canva login issues; directed to contact Yusuf in IT for assistance](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Marisol lacking Airtable access; instructed to post in onboarding channel and tag WITS](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Content managers' simulated assignments due next Wednesday/Thursday; company onboarding project (videos, context) ideally completed by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)

### Device Management & Security

  - [Company exploring options for remote management or providing company laptops](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [Decision pending, likely implemented in next few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Driven by potential client security requirements, not surveillance](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Current focus on login management through Okta](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### PTO Policy & Holidays

  - [Unlimited vacation policy with 15-20 days encouraged, plus \~10 US holidays (25-30 total)](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Flexibility to choose own country's holidays or align with US holidays for quieter work periods](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Digital nomads can generally observe holidays of their current location](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Emphasis on responsible time off and advance notice](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Performance Metrics & Management

  - [Formal KPIs/OKRs not yet established due to limited historical data](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Considering informal metrics (e.g., articles produced, rankings) for guidance, not judgment](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Current focus: communication with managers about expectations and performance](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Employees encouraged to proactively manage their own performance and seek feedback](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Team Introductions & Global Presence

  - [Dignory introduced as new EA for Jason (go-to-market lead), based in Medellin, Colombia](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Team members identified from various countries: Colombia, Chile, Argentina, Uruguay, Nigeria, India, Philippines](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

  - [Bridget to provide update on device management/security measures in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Team members to read "No Rules Rules" book about Netflix culture](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [Bridget to ask Alex about rescheduling today's meeting to Monday morning Pacific time](https://fathom.video/share/m2oxE2Cn_6xGZb89dJiErPfX1UHx3uBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
